note.summary: With only 24 accepted signals total, DOWN (n=11, WR 0.73), trending regime (n=22, WR 0.68), active volume (n=8, WR 0.875), supertrend bullish (n=15, WR 0.73), and z-score -1..1 (n=20, WR 0.7) show modestly positive separation in both WR and PnL/EV, while UP, noise regime, volume spike, and supertrend bearish buckets are clearly worse. Most other slices have n≤5 and are indistinguishable from noise. Positive avg EV coexists with negative realized PnL, underscoring the tiny sample.
warnings: n=24 total makes every bucket high-variance and overfitting-prone
negative total PnL despite +EV suggests cost/slippage or luck
watch for regime or volume stability in next 50+ signals before any further consideration

baseline.note: ledger totals that predate canonical lifecycle accounting (accounted explicitly)
